subject: A grand victory celebration on an ornate balcony or stadium platform, two central figures raising a trophy aloft beneath fireworks
description: Two white-clad figures at center stage raise their arms in triumph — one holds a glowing trophy or chalice aloft while fireworks explode in pink and violet behind them. They stand atop an elevated platform ringed by ornate gold railings and ceremonial banners with geometric symbols. To the left on a lower level, a hooded figure in darker clothing observes. To the right, a smaller armored figure watches. The overall scene is a stylized victory podium moment with theatrical pomp. The fireworks and gathered observers give the composition a sense of public spectacle and institutional ceremony.
foreground: ornate gold balcony railing with banners, observers flanking at lower levels
background: two white-clad figures raising trophy, fireworks exploding in pink and violet sky
